_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) processes and pipeline tools.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continuous integration principles, automated testing integration, artifact management, deployment automation patterns, and environment promotion strategies.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.752), TF-T-004 (TF, cosine: 0.748).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.2/10 (raw 0.718). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, continuous, deployment, integration, knowledge, pipeline]. DCWF-only terms [processes, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.903 (P=0.922, R=0.886). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) processes and" and "Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.817 > STS 0.718 (gap +0.098). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [cd, ci, continuous, deployment, integration] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 33.3%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, continuous, deployment, integration, knowledge, pipeline]. DCWF-only: [processes, tools]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, data].
